ai_summary: Amber Enterprises India Limited announced the groundbreaking for two major manufacturing facilities in Uttar Pradesh: an Ultra Mega AC plant and an advanced HDI PCB facility (via a joint venture, Ascent-K Circuit), the latter approved under a government electronics manufacturing scheme. This strategic expansion, backed by high-level government presence, is set to significantly boost domestic production, deepen value addition in import-dependent sectors like PCBs, and advance India's 'Aatmanirbhar Bharat' vision, presenting no immediate red flags.
